title: 高松宮記念の後に・それが私の選択

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...I won.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I won the G1 race to decide the ruler of the
sprint... I won the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Dang, Kawakami Princess is good.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I knew King Halo was old news! Maybe now
she'll finally move on.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh... no...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (If I won, that means King...)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why are you looking so glum?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry, King. Because of me, you...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're not going to apologize for hurting
my feelings or some other nonsense.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't be naive. This is a world of victory and
defeat—a place where you crush the dreams of
another to fulfill your own.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, even outside of this competitive world, it's
impossible to truly make your mark without
risking something in return.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Just as there can only be one King Halo, nobody
can be the same as another person.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
King... How could you lose? I thought you'd win
for sure...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It means she's past her prime. It's pitiful, honestly.
Stop fighting for the spotlight and make way for
the newer generation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm sure it's hard to watch... from your point
of view.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
However, I am proud that I chose to enter this
race, and I do not feel I was selfish in the
slightest!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Because I believe this was the choice that best
represents who I am!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much you try, you'll never make
me feel ashamed.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
How can I regret my actions if I was only being
true to myself? Would that not be the most
ridiculous notion of all?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I am King Halo, a first-rate Umamusume! And I
will live the way only I can.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...King.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Um... King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm... sorry about before! I...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's fine to feel remorse if you are ashamed about
your actions...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
However, don't be afraid of rejection or hurting
others' feelings.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Always listen to your own heart—not what anyone
else has to say.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is what you're doing something shameful, or is it
something you can take pride in?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If you can't distinguish between being
self-centered and being yourself, then you won't
be able to express anything at all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Being self-centered and being myself...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If the day ever comes when we compete again, I'll
go all out and give you a good thrashing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I won't hold back, no matter my opponent. That's
how I stay true to myself and how I show respect
to those who challenge me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I won't lose next time, Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right!
choice_data_list: Have you worked out your ideal self?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. The answer was within me all
along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some days later, Kawakami Princess comes to me
with a proposal.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Before the Takamatsunomiya Kinen, King asked
me whether I felt pride in myself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whether I could take pride in my own actions.
Whether they reflect my true self.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
King's words made me realize something—staying
true to myself doesn't mean I'm being
self-centered. So I'll keep on moving forward...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No matter what anyone else might think of me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, for next month's Fan Fest, I want to take
part in this event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess shows me a plan for a stage
event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Last Year's Tiara Tour in Retrospect!" A talk
show presented by glamorous Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It seems the Umamusume I competed against last
year will be there, as well as all their fans.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A true princess wouldn't back down from an
opportunity like this just because she felt
intimidated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I see sincere determination burning in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But somewhere deeper, I sense a subtle tremor, a
trembling accompanied by an eagerness to grow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right.
